title: James Bogenpohl II
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: James Bogenpohl II
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

education_entries: Ph D in Neuroscience, Emory University
BA in Biology, Washington University in St. Louis
research_interests: Genetics and Genomics of Alcohol Abuse
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2022). Heterozygous deletion of Cdc42bpb does not alter ethanol behaviors in mice. . Micropublication Biology.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2022). CLIC4 expression profile in the mouse medial prefrontal cortex and regulation by ethanol. . Alcoholism: Clinical and Experimental Research.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Olfactory Dysfunction in the 3xTg-AD Model of Alzheimer’s Disease . IBRO Neuroscience Reports. Volume, 10. Pages, 51-61.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Cross-species co-analysis of prefrontal cortex chronic ethanol transcriptome responses in mice and monkeys. . Frontiers in Molecular Neuroscience. Volume, 12. Issue, 197. Pages, 18.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Noradrenergic transmission at alpha1-adrenergic receptors in the ventral periaqueductal gray modulates arousal. . Biological Psychiatry. Volume, 85. Pages, 237-247.

Conference Proceeding (2018). Clic4, a protein regulating ethanol behaviors, is expressed in PFC oligodendrocytes but not neurons. . Alcoholism: Clinical and Experimental Research. Volume, 42. Issue, 6.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). α1b-Adrenergic Receptor Localization and Relationship to the D1-Dopamine Receptor in the Rat Nucleus Accumbens . Neuroscience.

Presentations: Shane Potters, Benjamin Goodman, Colleen Neff, Lily Kowalski, Abigail Bunting, Scott Burden, Nicholas Truver, Austin Thompson, Shania Smaw, Daniel Calvano, Jordan Sanchez, Darlene Mitrano, James Bogenpohl, Jessica Burket, Society for Neuroscience, "Examining behavioral and molecular effects after sub-chronic administration of an NMDA receptor partial agonist in a 22q11.2," Washington, DC. (2023)

Taylor Foreman, Eric English, Ayanna Limaye, Amy Doody, Michael Miles, James Bogenpohl, Research Society on Alcoholism Annual Scientific Meeting, "Clic4, a protein regulating ethanol behaviors, is expressed in PFC oligodendrocytes but not neurons.," San Diego, CA. (2018)
Grants and Sponsored Research: Ronald Quinlan, Todd Gruber , Dmitry Liskin, Lisa Webb, Christopher Meighan, Darlene Mitrano, James Bogenpohl, "Shimadzu LCMS 9030 Acquisition," Sponsored by Shimadzu
